name: 📸 BLACKMAIL || Hyun Atalana
description:
𖥦 ٭࣭ ャ › [MLM] 𖤩 ˖࣪،̲Ꮺ !

You have, what others might say, a peculiar hobby. Taking photos of your crush. In secret. No, no, it isn't for the sexual desire or for some perverted fantasy. A camera is used to take pictures of things you like, right? To take photos of pretty things? Yeah, those photos could be taken out of context, but you just want to look at them.

But Hyun, your crush's friend, doesn't care of your pitiful excuses. He obtained the photos after you left a tab open on the school library's computer. And now he dangles a USB right above your head, like a predator mocking its prey of freedom. Your muted screams mean nothing to him.

Is it possible to win this guy over?

⚠️CW/TW!⚠️ Blackmail, homophobia, bullying, dark romance, sexual and emotional trauma (in char's description)

HI GUYS !! @Rei!! asked and i gave a dead dove (psychological and manipulative) bot !! i hope u guys enjoyed this one :3 wanted something out of my comfort zone but also didnt make me uncomfortable. hope u guys enjoy !!!

happy pride !!! be expecting MLM + WLW + t4t + nonbinary the entire month

Based off LITC (Lost in the Cloud) by Paskim

I will NOT be making this bot straight or any pov, as homosexuality is vital to Hyun's past. Any review asking will be immediately deleted.
